rewritten_requirements: The system shall allow users to open a budget-checking window from the main screen.
The system shall wait for the user to select a client before proceeding with the checking process.
The system shall require users to select a campaign related to the chosen client before allowing them to check information.
The system shall display results only after both a client and a campaign are selected.
The system shall allow users to refresh or recheck information by pressing the check button again.
The system shall prompt users with a confirmation message before closing the window.
The system shall return to the main screen if the user confirms closing the window.
The system shall keep the window open and allow further interaction if the user cancels the close action.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Users should be able to open a budget-checking window from the main screen.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: the system provides a feature that allows users to open a budget-checking window from the main screen.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system waits for the user to select a client before proceeding with the checking process.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: At first, no client is selected, so the system waits for the user to choose one. The user cannot proceed until a client is selected.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Users must select a campaign related to the chosen client before they can check information.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: After selecting a client, the system then requires the user to select a campaign related to that client. If no campaign is selected, the system continues to wait and does not perform any action.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system displays results only after both a client and a campaign are selected.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Once both the client and campaign are selected, the system allows the user to check the information. Initially, nothing is shown in the result area. When the user presses the check button, the system displays the corresponding result.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Users can refresh or recheck information by pressing the check button again.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: The user can press the check button again if they want to refresh or recheck the information.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system prompts users with a confirmation message before closing the window.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: At any time, the user may choose to close the window. When the close button is pressed, the system shows a confirmation message asking whether the user wants to continue or cancel the action.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system returns to the main screen if the user confirms closing the window.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If the user confirms, the system returns to the main screen.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system keeps the window open and allows further interaction if the user cancels the close action.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If the user cancels, the window remains open so the user can continue working.
